title: Demo: issue anatomy showcase (fixture)
description: A stress-test fixture exercising every issue section at maximum variety — multi-tier notes & brainstorm, agent-memory with folders, and all agent-log kinds (loop / audit / refactor / workflow / fast-iteration) as NNN_<name>/ activity folders, plus a trivial flat one-off. Used to eyeball the issues layout with everything populated. Not real work.
author: sidhantha
